LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO APRIL-28-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT FOR $12,800.83 AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHNREY MAGCALING; THIS IS THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT ($15,143.83) LESS WHAT DEFENDANT HAS PAID ($2,343.00). PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK ADDITIONAL COSTS THROUGH A COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A.'s unopposed motion to enforce settlement is granted. Plaintiff is directed to submit a proposed judgment for $12,800.83 against defendant Johnrey Magcaling; this is the settlement amount ($15,143.83) less what defendant has paid ($2,343.00). Plaintiff may seek additional costs through a cost bill after judgment.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
